text: The corridor outside feels empty and tense, as if thick with anticipation and the echo of unseen footsteps. Inside, the quiet hum of monitors and the bold R+D text foster curiosity. The illuminated words about uncertainty resonate with me, inviting contemplation. I feel the creative energy of an unfinished idea, paired with cautious optimism. Here, wonder and unease blend together—the allure of possibility in every question left unanswered.
